basics.name: Jeff Tong
basics.label: Senior Software Development Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience building scalable architectures for analytics, healthcare, and financial/payment platforms. Specializes in fraud analytics, platform modernization, and security-minded product delivery with full-stack development expertise. Passionate about offensive and defensive cybersecurity strategies.

work.name: CVS Health
work.summary: Design, architect, and implement modernization-refactoring of backend services and legacy frontends.
highlights: Refactored legacy MinuteClinic services to FastAPI to improve care provider scheduling experience.

work.name: UglyEgg.AI
highlights: Architected scalable solution for Generative Search Optimization.
Development of frontend with React with feedback from business stakeholders to drive revenue.
Development of analytics and scraping services with Node.js to facilitate core business.

work.name: Starbucks Coffee Company
work.position: Software Development Engineer III - Retail Fraud Analytics
work.summary: Built fraud decisioning, analytics, and internal productivity systems.
highlights: Implemented performance improvements in a custom Spark analytics platform, reducing execution time by about 77%.
Architected and shipped a fraud decisioning and reporting system with REST APIs and Kafka log streaming that increased fraud detection.
Maintained and migrated settlement and reconciliation systems that prevent significant financial loss.
Discovered and reported internal and vendor application vulnerabilities to reduce remote code execution and data breach risk.
Built an internal Retrieval-Augmented Generation assistant on Databricks to improve team resolution time.
Created GitHub Copilot agentic workflows to summarize commits and generate Jira stories for multiple teams.
Prototyped agentic harnesses with Pi for internal orchestration and reporting.

work.name: Starbucks Coffee Company
work.summary: Delivered secure payment platform enhancements for high-volume transaction systems.
highlights: Implemented TOTP (RFC-6238) backend support for the Stars for Everyone launch.
Served as Team Security Champion and influenced secure architecture decisions early in the SDLC.
Supported mission-critical payment services handling millions of dollars in transactions with 24/7 availability.
Delivered Google Pay integration for Payment Service REST APIs used by the mobile app.

work.name: Starbucks Coffee Company - Summit Group Solutions Inc.
work.summary: Delivered payment platform enhancements for Stars for Everyone initiatives prior to direct FTE transition.
highlights: Implemented Google Pay integration for payment APIs used by the mobile application.
Delivered bug fixes and feature additions to Payment Method REST APIs aligned to roadmap goals.
Standardized JWT-based API security and promoted code reviews, static analysis, and documentation.
Designed and executed load testing to ensure APIs exceeded production traffic targets.

work.name: Agilysys
work.summary: Led modernization efforts and microservices adoption for hospitality products.
highlights: Architected modernization from legacy systems to microservices architecture.
Engineered Guest Profile and Itinerary microservices using ASP.NET Core, RabbitMQ, and Docker.
Mentored developers on modern frameworks and Domain-Driven Design.
Led offshore development and QA coordination for distributed delivery.

work.name: BECU
work.summary: Built full-stack applications for lending business lines.
highlights: Delivered full-stack web applications for HELOC and Home Loans lines of business.

work.name: Agilysys
work.summary: Delivered customer-critical engineering solutions and improved installation, security, and platform stability.
highlights: Resolved VP/CEO-level critical issues that unblocked a project valued at about $2.2M.
Designed a reusable WiX installer framework used across multiple products.
Refactored ASP.NET booking engines, WCF services, and internal tooling to improve reliability.
Developed RESTful authentication services and implemented PCI-related security fixes.

work.name: Agilysys
work.summary: Resolved high-impact customer issues and supported major project continuity.
highlights: Provided deep investigations and resolutions for VP/CEO-level customer escalations.
Unblocked projects valued at approximately $2.2M.

work.name: Agilysys - Technology Innovations Group LLC
work.summary: Supported build and product engineering workflows while modernizing tooling and integration surfaces.
highlights: Developed code fixes and tooling improvements for build systems and product code quality.
Migrated Team Foundation Server databases and upgraded TFS from 2010 to 2012.
Built custom MSBuild targets for versioning, code signing, coverage, and WiX installer automation.
Refactored partner interfaces and supported mixed VB6 and VB.NET build interoperability.

work.name: Microsoft
work.summary: Improved engineering throughput and code quality tooling across major product groups.
highlights: Supported the CoreXt build system spanning MSBuild and NMake projects.
Reduced productivity and test-time loss by resolving and preventing build breaks.
Developed a source-control check-in quality tool adopted by Office 365, Xbox Kinect, and Exchange teams.
Contributed work recognized in Engineering Excellence award consideration.

work.name: InterConnection
work.summary: Built and evolved inventory and reporting tooling for refurbishing operations and donation tracking.
highlights: Developed the next version of Refurbisher Inventory Tool with WMI-based hardware discovery and SQL tracking.
Partnered with founders and management to improve operational processes through software.
Added reporting for DOD-compliant quality wiping tracking of drives and phones.
Implemented donation tracking workflows for major enterprise and nonprofit contributors.

work.name: Microsoft - TEKSystems
work.position: Refurbisher Preinstallation Kit / Refurbisher Inventory Tool / Easy Windows Deployment Engineer
work.summary: Developed and tested deployment and refurbisher tooling for large-scale client deployment programs.
highlights: Built migration and diff tools in C++, PowerShell, and T-SQL for configuration and schema transitions.
Developed Refurbisher Inventory Tool across C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, and IIS stacks.
Owned EWD feature delivery from release candidate to RTM, including installer and performance work.
Migrated local builds into CoreXt while satisfying prefix, OACR, Prefast, and FxCop quality gates.

work.name: Microsoft - TEKSystems
work.position: FlexGo Deployment / Technical Support / Sustained Engineering
work.summary: Supported FlexGo deployment quality, hotfix engineering, and partner delivery operations.
highlights: Executed black-box and grey-box testing strategies for client/server QFE and hotfix validation.
Developed deployment scripts and applications for fix distribution and manufacturing workflows.
Led root cause analysis and break-fix support for partner critical incidents.
Built C# server utility to normalize local time to UTC as part of manufacturing workflows.

work.name: Microsoft - Siemens Business Services, Inc.
work.position: FlexGo Deployment / Technical Support / Sustained Engineering
work.summary: Supported global partner onboarding, manufacturing, and technical escalation efforts for FlexGo 1.0.
highlights: Contributed to onboarding and deployment operations for partners across Brazil, China, Russia, and Mexico.
Owned FlexGo 1.0 client self-hosting project management responsibilities.
Created support procedures and documentation for Tier 1/2/3 operations.
Handled critical issue troubleshooting through workaround and final resolution.

work.name: Microsoft - Siemens Business Services, Inc.
work.summary: Provided Tier III IPTV escalation support and operational engineering across server and network systems.
highlights: Built lightweight automated UI testing tools in C#.
Supported IPTV 1.0 environments across IIS 6.0, SQL Server 2000, and Windows Server 2003.
Authored installation and configuration guidance for IPTV Personal Server.
Performed bug validation and contributed to client and server build quality checks.
